free_text: Study of charged particles emitted from 117Te compound
Au (300 ug/cm2) - Se (1 mg/cm2) - Au (800 ug/cm2)
- proton, deuteron, triton and alpha angular
differential cross section at Ecm-132 MeV in Fig.12
cannot be digitized because it is not possible to
distinguish between open and solid symbols.
